search:azure-devops:azure devops pipelin.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `az acr build --image <your-image-name> .`
  - `az webapp config container set --name <your-app-name> --resource-group <your-resource-group> --docker-custom-image-name <your-image-name>`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Azure Pipelines: 2025
  - Azure DevOps Server: 2026

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `Dockerfile`: Specifies the build context and instructions.
  - `Azure Container Registry (ACR)`: Stores Docker images.
  - `Azure App Service`: Deploys and runs web applications.

- **CLI Commands**:
  - `az acr build --image <your-image-name> .`
  - `az containerapp create --name <your-app-name> --resource-group <your-resource-group> --image <your-image-name>`

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Azure CLI: Version 2.49.0
  - Azure DevOps: Latest stable version

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `acrName`: Name of your Azure Container Registry.
  - `resourceGroupName`: Resource group where the container app will be deployed.
  - `image`: The name of the Docker image to deploy.
